flagged_partnerships.text: Hi Concessa! We're interested in a partnership opportunity. We work with creators and would love to collaborate on a sponsorship. Would love to discuss the possibilities!

product_inquiries.text: What's your pricing for enterprise teams? We have about 200 users and need custom integrations. Also interested in a demo.
We'd love to partner on this. Your product aligns with our audience.
What's the pricing? Interested in the video bundle.
